questions.question: Explain the difference between framing, flow control, and error control in the Data Link Layer. Provide one example of each service. (15 marks)
What is the main difference between connectionless and connection-oriented link control protocols? Provide an example of each. (10 marks)
Describe the role of framing in the Data Link Layer. Explain how it enables reliable data transfer over a physical medium. (12 marks)
